explanations.pt-br: Classe completa: vector store (ChromaDB), embedder, tokenizer e LLM generator.
explanations.en-us: Complete class: vector store (ChromaDB), embedder, tokenizer, and LLM generator.

explanations.pt-br: INGEST: documentos embeddados e salvos no vector store com IDs automáticos.
explanations.en-us: INGEST: documents embedded and saved to vector store with automatic IDs.

explanations.pt-br: QUERY: retrieve (busca vetorial), augment (monta prompt com contexto), generate (LLM responde).
explanations.en-us: QUERY: retrieve (vector search), augment (builds prompt with context), generate (LLM answers).

explanations.pt-br: Uso: indexar documentos e fazer perguntas. Respostas fundamentadas nos documentos indexados.
explanations.en-us: Usage: index documents and ask questions. Answers grounded in indexed documents.
